mapper.select: SELECT /* dupBook */ COUNT(*) FROM TM_BOOK_INFO WHERE BOOK_ISBN = #{bookIsbn}
SELECT /* getBookNumbByIsbn */ BOOK_NUMB FROM TM_BOOK_INFO WHERE BOOK_ISBN = #{bookIsbn}

SELECT /* getPublicRatingAverageByIsbn */ ROUND(AVG(TO_NUMBER(P.REPORT_GRDE)), 1) FROM TM_BOOK_INFO B INNER JOIN TM_BOOK_REPORT P ON B.BOOK_NUMB = P.BOOK_NUMB WHERE B.BOOK_ISBN = #{bookIsbn} AND P.REPORT_STAT = #{reportStatDone}
